reviews.review_text:
Nice park with good facilities.
Plenty of site options
Lovely hot showers
Would highly recommend

Just had another visit May 2026...just wonderful...great winter specials.

Facilities are spotless...this is the epitome of how a caravan park should be run
Friendly staff - Jenny in Reception was fantastic.

Great spot to spend a while. The old section is nice with the shade and protection from the wind. The new section and facilities are well done and comfortable and the old facilities may need an upgrade, particularly the showers. Sites are cheap and accessibility into town is good. Overall very good place to stay.
Great service and great amenities, Wi-Fi doesn't work 🙄

My family and I have been visiting Discovery Parks at least once a year for over 15 years, and during that time we have stayed at most of your locations across South Australia. This was our second visit to Goolwa Discovery Park.

We would like to note that we do not raise complaints about minor issues. However, on this occasion, the experience was not as enjoyable as it has been in the past. The proximity of campers positioned very close to the cabins—particularly on the small grassed areas surrounding them—significantly reduced the sense of space, privacy, and overall enjoyment that we expect when paying premium rates for cabin accommodation.

This arrangement made it difficult for my family and me to fully relax, as it created a feeling of being constantly overlooked. In all our years visiting other Discovery Parks, we have not encountered a similar setup.

Additionally, we experienced an issue at the boom gate upon arrival. A vehicle ahead of us was unable to enter, and while we were waiting behind for 7 minutes , a staff member tall skinny lady came out of the office to assist them. During this interaction, we were instructed to reverse in a manner that felt abrupt and discourteous. Once the vehicle ahead was admitted, the staff member returned to the office without any acknowledgment or communication with us.

We hope you will take this feedback into consideration, as these matters had a noticeable impact on our overall experience. We would have otherwise rated our stay five stars.

So many barking dogs. Sites with dogs spread out throughout the whole park. Dogs barking while owners present and doing nothing about it. Left a day early. Park has very good facilities; however the number of dogs out ways the good. Won’t be back.

Great park.
Location was good, close to shops.
Park is huge, great entertainment for the kids. Staff were helpful and friendly, cabins were big and clean

Not good. We stayed Friday to Tuesday over Easter weekend. Park was packed. Amenities were filthy, only cleaned once per day. Water and toilet paper all over floor, no soap or paper towel and overflowing bins, EVERYDAY!! Even actual poo on the floor on 2 occasions. Witnessed a lady call reception to get this addressed but no one came to clean it! Really really bad. No hot water in men’s bathroom from Saturday until Tuesday either. My kids hated it because of the state of the amenities despite all the facilities there for kids. Won’t ever stay here again.
Nicely looked after, good facilities and camp kitchen.

Wow. What a brilliant caravan park, this place is set up for the best relaxing holiday even if you have kids.

2 seperate pools, a splash park, jumping pillow, bike and scooter track, grassed area and 2 seperate playgrounds. Entertainment for the kids all day long especially when the weather is nice.

The deluxe cabin, 2 rooms which can sleep 5, all the amenities, plenty of room for all 5 of us. Still in near new condition.

The location is perfect, so peaceful and quiet, you can walk to the main Street for food and activities, only 20minutes to Victor harbour.

Please do yourselves a favour and get to this gem you won't be disappointed. We will definitely be back again for a longer stay.

Thanks Goolwa Discovery Park

The discovery park is simpler perfect for a family escape been the best most relaxing 2 night stay with a very tired 4 year old by the end of the day. Pools are clean and big and suitable for all ages splash park is so fun pedal cars were great and gave dad a work out lol rooms were perfectly equipped for big families - we had me and baby in the main room and dad and 2 older kids in the other room. Spacious clean and everything thought of right down to coffee tea comfort beds pillows and blankets and free wifi. We went in a Sunday Monday which was perfect not too busy and no neighbours and everyone super quiet and respectful once it got dark.
Amazing Park

Apparently  on the weekends, school holidays  and long weekends its gets very busy its huge . Larger grassed sites for vans . Some sites are not close to toilets and showers  although it has a small unisex one . Obstacles on footpath on the weekends .Dogs allowed People and cars are everywhere  - free range Children  . Need privacy screens on vans as it is very very open to others . Town is about 1km to park . It has 263 spots for accomadation accomadates 1000s  at one time  . Newish and  clean area and clean newish facilities  . Things get pinched  outside . Lock everything up . Note when families go home . It's dead quiet - pleasant then .

A very spacious park on the edge of Goolwa township.
Excellent facilities, so much to do for the kids.
Both pools are excellent, lots of play areas.
If you have kids it's a must visit.
Don't expect the site you think you booked...someone liked ours better and they swapped without consultation...poor service

Very very disappointed in Discovery Parks. We have missed our closing date by 1 week due to various disruptions of ill health and family problems. When we rang to negotiate an extension of time, only being 2 weeks, they didn't want to negotiate at all. So we have lost $300.00 Thanks for your understanding.

I have had such a great laid-back time at this place. The vibes are theeee Best, even just walking my dog around. So many families having fun you can't help but soak up some of that happiness. Staff at check in point are helpful and friendly, so the whole experience begins well and keeps rolling along that way.

It was very expensive for what we got, the bed smelled of body odour, very dirty, staff were nice, pool was great 👍 we couldn't find anything we needed in the town, we had to drive to Victor Harbour to get things we needed. Smokers right next to us filled our cabin with smoke every 10 minutes.  It was about 2 stars 🌟 🌟 if honest.
Fabulous park for everybody,beautiful green park,clean cabins,roomy park and great facilities allround,will return for sure

We stay in 3 cabins for family get away.  The park was in full capacity which caused over crowding for the facilities on Australia Day.  Both  pools were over full to the max surely thats risky.  If Park management has increased the number of guests then it also needs to increase its the facilities guest can use. At the moment its not enough.  Some older kids were bombing in the pool and quite dangerous for the smaller kids.  No parents around  or staff  even though there were  signs indicating that there would be no supervision and bombing was not allowed of course thats wasnt being adhered to so staff need to patrol not full time but checking in would be helpful to make it an joyable experience for all guests.
Reception staff were not friendly and being busy caused problems for them.  Cabins were neat and tidy but i will not stay again due to overcrowding which makes it difficult for kids especially with older and bigger kids using equipment and play areas pushing the younger ones.
John at the front desk is awesome

We have been visitors to this caravan park for about 4 years and it never disappoints. The staff are friendly, amenities are great and always so much to do. Great free kids activities, pools, water park, playgrounds, jumping pillow, basketball court, food trucks and coffee van.
It is one of our favourites and we will continue to come back.
Probably the best caravan park I've been to. Everything is brand new and top quality. Plenty of space, the water park is top tier. Our kids have been loving the place.
Very nice park well kept and our daughter loved the water park and pool hopefully will be back again soon

Amazing place to stay. Very good facilities and the staff are awesome. I went in Jan 2023 and the pool and water park were awesome. I love this park and the location is great. I met the friendly groundskeeper Jamie and he was very welcoming.

Goolwa is one of my all time favorite caravan parks.

I didn’t even get as far as staying with this company. My story starts and ends at the gate.
My parents were staying here for a weekend, I was staying home, they forgot some things so I came to drop them off until I got to the entrance with no signage on where to actually go after you’ve entered the property, I waited at the boom gates to enter the park whilst my mum was on her way to let me in, when all of a sudden a lady from the office obnoxiously knocked on my window and said in the rudest tone I’ve heard in a while “we don’t have your number plate with us, why are you here?” I’m confused as I told her that my mum is in there on her way to let me in and she replied as if I just ruined her whole week “well you shouldn’t be parked here so your gonna have to reverse out.”
Ummm excuse me? She spoke to me like I’m the idiot when it isn’t common sense to wait outside their long driveway, you’d think there’s more than 3 parks inside or another way to get into park when I was only there to drop off some things.
Whoever that worker was shouldn’t be in any position to speak with customers when I was just confused in a confusing place but received judgement and no help.
Was able to choose my site when booking over the phone, great facilities. Good base to explore surrounding coastline, McLaren Vale and take a couple of trips into Adelaide.
We are in one of the newer cabins lovely cabin. 3 pools water park playground great for kids.
Great place to stay, pool and splash park....plenty of room for kids to ride bikes and scooters around
It's a really good holiday park with a lot of activities for kids. My ones loved the water park and the other activities. Cabins are really good and clean equipped with all the essential facilities.

Great van park...
Great facilities...
Like all big parks is costly... camping isnt cheap any more..
But well worth it a couple of times uear..
Great spot, been refurbished totally a few years ago. Kids will love it!

A beautifully presented caravan park that covers all age groups and travel lifestyles. From the most basic of camping needs, right up to the very fancy cabins. Play equipment for the kids that will never see them bored. Amenities that are cleaned daily to the highest level. The staff are friendly and accommodating. Pet friendly. A secure gate system that uses your vehicle registration as the code, this is a brilliant system! All in all, can't fault the park at all. Well worth a stay 🤙 Full video on our socials

Fantastic park, will be back! Jan2025

So we came back Nov 25, and have reduced to 4*.

Lady on check in Friday afternoon was miserable. Reception staff on Sunday morning for carts and check out was very unfriendly.

The rest of the park is still clean and great facilities.

2nd stay and issues with entry gate. Pay extra for extended stay (leave before 5pm) and after 10am gate code won’t work. Number plate recognition program is a fail. Amenities are ordinary. Park is not bad but not great either
Great water park, plenty of cabins to choose from and very well maintained

Had a lovely weekend stay for a family reunion after the school holidays. Wasn’t to busy. Lovely park and cabins were beautiful. Everything about our stay was easy.
Thanks again x

Would recommend to stay at the caravan  park the staff are friendly and you have all the amenities. .my wife and I fell in love with goolwa will be looking forward to come back soon .we didn't wont to leave.
Nice park well worth the stay great large site matting where we were

Stayed on a powered grass site and it was so plush and green. The amenities were clean, showers were amazing. Hot and high pressure.

Friendly staff at all times, always saying hello.

We have always been here camping in a tent. The sits are really nice and large. The amenities are always clean and well looked after. Staff are friendly and helpful. The park also has great amusements for kids, jumping pillow, 2 playgrounds, 2 pools, water park and activity shed. One of our go to caravan parks.
Love this place

A TREE BRANCH DESTROYED MY EXTERIOR ANTENNA & INTERIOR WINDER ON MY CARAVAN DURING HIGH WINDS 14/9 25.
HEAD OFFICE DENIED MY CLAIM SAID TO USE MY INSURANCE.
THIS WILL COST ME HUNDREDS OF DOLLARS FOR A CLAIM  NOT MY FAULT.

Booking multiple sites was a nightmare. The staff were rude both over the phone and in person, and it wasn’t just me – other groups copped the same treatment. The park itself is great, but the staff really let it down.

Good place to go with kids.
The water park was freezing though so not really usable in September.

Beautiful rooms great service wonderful location  was kind service and was happy with my stay at the goowla discovery park with my friends. For over the weekend staff helpful highly recommend this place for a holiday
Great facilities for kids and adults, friendly staff will be back for Xmas.

One of the best parks we have stayed in, clean, tidy, comfortable modern cabins. Great facilities for caravaners and campers
Kids playgrounds and waterpark etc are beautifully maintained. Quiet location away from the main road.
Highly recommend.
Very new looking park, spacious well maintained. Excellent.
Tidy and clean and well kept holiday park
Would never go back had stuff stolen from a Rachel Vincent that lives in the park will be taken more action
A great spot to feel like to are away from the city, without having to drive hours and hours.  Kids have a ball.

We stayed for two nights in one of the family cabins with our elderly mums.
Excellent set up, very cosy and close to all we needed.
Thai so our second stay here and we will be back again.
Fantastic ensuite sites with concrete slabs. Big flat sites. Excellent amenities and a beautiful well kept park. Love the automatic boom gate. We will definitely stay here again.

I stayed at Discovery Parks - Goolwa and it was an amazing caravan park for kids and adults.

The first thing I’d like to say is, the jumping pillow is excellent. Very bouncy and soft. Nice shading covers. My feet would be fried if that wasn’t there.

Also, it has a nice big concrete path around the whole park. Perfect for bike or scooter riding. The staff are kind too.

Nice and quiet unlike most other places where people stay up all night at the camp kitchen being as loud as they can. Fabulous location for a caravan park too!

The waterpark is really cool and it has a lot of stuff to do. Cool slides, sprinklers and the falling water bucket is really cool. If it’s winter and you want to go in the pool then go in the water park first so your body can get used to the cold water so it’s easier to get in the pool.

30 minute drive to victor harbor where you can play The Dunes Minigolf Course and it’s pretty good. Also in victor harbor there is a beach with some really cool looking shells.

Overall, great caravan park. I would 100% recommend this place for a holiday.
Great value for money, great facilities for the kids and amenities. The rooms were comfortable and clean. Overall a fantastic stay

I just spent a great 12-night stay here on a powered site using a great online deal (from the Discovery Parks website).

It's a large, modern park with nice open spaces, and the large swimming pool looked good, but it's too cold at this time of year (for me, at least).

The only slight thing that was a bit odd was the new toilet/shower block in the newer part of the park.  While nice and new, it had these cheap and nasty shower heads that spray everywhere except straight down.  However, I noticed the old shower block (in the older part of the park) had more modern handheld showers with great pressure, so I used those instead, I don't know why these parks have got to use theses cheap quality shower heads, they really are not very nice to use.

But the showers were only a slight thing, it really didn't matter too much, overall I loved my stay here, and I'd definitely come back sometime in the future

Our chairs and table were stolen at the site! During Anzac holiday. Was a kind of scary experience luckily we were fine. We reported the case to the front office but unfortunately were told that 'they don't take any responsibility for it'. They also said would check on CCTV and provide updates, which neither happened!!

Wow where do I start. IM overwhelmed by the generosity and kindness of the staff at this amazing park   I’m a solo female traveller in a campervan and first spoke to Sarah to make  a booking. Wow what a friendly helpful kind lady she is.  Booked a site for 2 nights.  Great site Then I had an accident/fall walking to the goolwa railway to victor harbour.  In the arvo all the kind staff -Ming- and everyone rang 000 as my knee was worse   Jamie the head caretaker took me in his golf cart back to my van as I couldn’t walk.  Long story short   In hospital overnight.  Broken kneecap and have to cancel my 4mth  trip   Omg Ming and Sarah are the kindest humans and Jamie too helped me pack up my van and move it to a fabulous deluxe suite. While I wait for my son from Sydney to arrive  and I’m alone in another state I’m overwhelmed by their kindness and generosity   I can’t thank you enough.  Jamie, Ming and Sarah and the other staff.  You are all a credit to this business.  I thank you all so much and you made me feel not alone.  Also this park is awesome.  Best I’ve been in. And this deluxe cabin is the best  How lucky I had my accident in goolwa   You all went far and beyond n🙏🙏🙏😟🦋🦋🦋🚐🚐🚐

Handy location
Nice space
Helpful front staff

Our 2 bedroom deluxe cabin in the newer section of the park was excellent overall.
Aircons in both bedrooms, plus the living area.
Plenty of powerpoints.
Big fridge , great oven and hotplates , microwave and dishwasher.
Plenty of crockery, cutlery and utensils.
Big, very modern TV.
Very comfy bed in the main bedroom.
No BBQ on the verandah, but there are many undercover BBQ's in the park. The nearest one to us was probably only 30 metres away.
There is also a terrific camp kitchen.
Really, the only thing that we could have wished for was that the park was on the beachfront, but it is what it is.
Very friendly staff on arrival and departure too.

Very good specials available.
Still to determine the stay, just arrived.
Beautiful caravan park with exceptional amenities dotted around the park. Our site is large and spacious. Staff are very friendly and helpful.
Great park to stay.  Staff helpful. Ground staff assistance to rescue dog from under building was first Class. Can't thank them enough.

Absolutely my favourite Discovery park. 1st time in Goolwa and definitely won't be my last. Stayed in deluxe cabin & it was perfect. Very modern, great amenities & everything you need. Bed was sensational. I slept more in the 3 nights while I was than than I can remember. Wish I could take it home with me lol. Staff are amazing & very attentive, actually strike up a conversation about something you told them previously. Nice walk to main strip with shops, bakeries and petrol station. Variety of restaurants. Very close to Port Elliott & Victor Harbour. Highly recommend. Can't wait to go back!

Not Family Friendly – Loud, Offensive, and Completely Ignored

We stayed at Discovery Parks Goolwa over Easter and it was a major disappointment. A large group (around 25-30 people) across sites 45–47 (and the 3 sites that backed in) ruined the entire weekend — drinking and blasting music from lunchtime every day, then ramping it up into the night. The earliest they stopped was 10:30pm, and on the final night they kept going until 12:30am, yelling, singing, and swearing at the top of their lungs like they were at a pub.

The language was absolutely foul — constant and aggressive. If they said three words, two of them were swear words. We’ve stayed at parks all over the country and never heard anything like it, especially not with so many kids around.

It didn’t stop there. One of their mates attempted a skid in a ute just two metres from our tent — with children all around. They also played a song filled with racial slurs. There were at least six kids under 10 on surrounding sites, including ours. It was unsafe, offensive, and totally inappropriate for a park that claims to be family-friendly.

A neighbour politely asked them to turn the music down at 10:08pm on the second night and was told to wait — because they were “partying even harder” the next night. And they did. This was all communicated to the front of house team….

And what did Discovery Parks do? Sent one generic text asking all guests to keep the noise down after 10pm. That was it. No staff followed up, no one came down, and nothing was done to address the situation.

If Discovery Parks are going to have rules, they need to enforce them. If they’re going to allow large groups, they need to take responsibility when things get out of control. And if they’re going to promote themselves as family friendly, then this kind of behaviour simply cannot be ignored.

The idea that guests should have to enforce your 10pm curfew themselves by calling an after-hours number — while trying to calm scared or overtired kids — is just not good enough. A group of 25+ people across six sites was out of control every night, and a single generic text message doesn’t cut it.

We ended up leaving a day early and staying elsewhere just to catch up on sleep. A tired child is not a happy child — and thanks to this stay, no one in our group was.

We won’t be returning — and if you’re a family looking for a safe, relaxing place to stay, we strongly suggest you look elsewhere too…

Fabulous caravan park
Lots of cabins, beautiful new ones by the pool or older style. Sites are spacious, amenities cleaned daily & in good condition. Heated pool.
Great stay with the family. Kids loved the pool and the water play area. Rooms nicely fitted and clean.
A well located park central to Goolwa and all its attractions and an easy 30 minute drive to the larger centre of Victor Harbor

We were very impressed with the caravan park at Goolwa. It has two sections, one is older and then they have a very modern section with impressive amenities. We have a travel auction voucher to use there, just have to choose a date.

Great park with all sorts of facilities to cater for all types of camping, big and small sites all with power and plenty of things for the kids to do and enjoy. Fairly priced and friendly staff. So far a very nice place to be just bring warm clothes cause it does get cold being south and close to the ocean.

One of the best parks on the Flueriueu
Nice and clean and excellent facilities for young kids 👦
Was great

We stayed in the caravan park part and I cannot believe how beautiful this caravan park is - the park is stunning with the best playground I habe seen - beautiful pool - camp kitchens all round as well as BBQ areas under cover - stunning fire pit areas (that can only be used out of fire season which is good) the toilets - I have never seen such beautiful and super clean toilets and showers - the cleaners are amazing - the staff are exceptional and extremely friendly and professional- I would live here if I could ❤️ love love love this park

Not a bad place.  Neat and tidy, clean facilities.  Sites are a good size that allow for a bit of personal space.

Only disappointment was the grumpy guy at the after hours phone. We arrived 30min after the reception closed.

Sorry I interrupted your time off. But don't offer an after hours check in or put a sign uo for late arrivals to just pick a site and don't bug you.

I would have given 3 stars for service, but lucky the receptionist guy in the morning was the total opposite. Very chirpy and happy lad who likes a good chinwag and provides some helpful tips for your travel. Keep it up.

This is the only caravan park we have ever stayed (or off grid). Can not fault. Amazing services for all to use, some great large sized camp sites. 2 pools, water park, 2 playgrounds, amazing staff, clean amenities. Would highly recommend to all.
A very nice park indeed, lots of room, large allotments and very well maintained facilities, hope to be back here again one day. If you are staying in the area this is the place to stay. 👍🏻🇦🇺
Fantastic for kids

Comfortable accommodation, easy walk to town. Very family-friendly with heaps of activities for kids, big and little.
Come back again. Yep.
Tell others. Yep.
Nice park

We stayed in a budget cabin (pet friendly room), the cabin was very clean, and we couldn't smell any animal smell, which was great. The bed was so comfortable that we didn't have to put our mattress topper on,
Would've liked to have had bedside tables in the bedroom, though
The pool was very inviting, and the steps made it easy to get in. However, someone needs to go around the inside of the pool and wipe off the sunscreen, etc. That has accumulated there
There were also lounges under shade sails, which was very nice
We spent most nights at the BBQ area with our friend's, and took the time to clean the BBQ after we used it. It's a shame that other campers didn't do the same
We enjoyed our stay and will return

Was here many years ago & what an improvement.  Travelling in a caravan & have visited many caravan parks over the years, this would have to be up there with the best of them. Facilities cater for everyone, pool, kids playground, water park, amenities are all top notch.
A definite recommendation & would return if we are this way again

Travellers from WA

Love our stays with Discovery parks.
We are travelling with family and thinking of exploring other parks interstate to explore more.
The staff are amazing mataining the needs of the park.
There is a swimming pool and water play area with  slides.
Giant pillow for families to jump on  and a playground.
The park has a second pool and playground with barbacue areas placed around the park.
There is a building with a wood pizza oven and large kitchen area.
Pancakes and movie nights are presented to families.

We are heading next up to Lake Bony up north in South Australia.

Later, we are heading to Western Australia.
I'm thinking of Cradle Mountain in Tasmania.
My brother showed us photos of his visit and how beautiful it is.

Well done to the staff and management, an awesome second visit to this site.

Goolwa Caravan Park - Very nice lady on reception moved me to a large site next to my friend who had a cabin. Park is well maintained with good level sites. Powered site with potable water and wastewater drain is handy. Facilities very clean. Showers hot and good pressure. My pal’s cabin was really nice too. Weather was REALLY hot but the evenings and nights were cool. Out most of the day - we were out and about so the hot weather wasn’t a big deal. Lots to see and do in and around Goolwa and you can drive on the beach (4WD only) for cockling, bathing and fishing. You can drive or long walk to the beach carpark and then there’s walking access to the beach from the carpark.
Such a great park. Lots to do for the little ones. Facilities are some of the best conditions/cleanliness. Staff were great to deal with. Will definitely be returning :)

We had a great overnight stay recently in one of the cabins. Cabin was clean, neat and well maintained. Kitchen had everything needed to prepare a meal for a family of 4. Park was quiet and pool noise didn’t carry. The kids loved the pool, the splash park wasn’t operating at the time we were there but they didn’t mind. My husband loved the automatic number plate reading gates. We will definitely be planning a longer holiday soon.

This caravan park is so clean at all times, the staff are very friendly and interact with all their customer. Five star service!
So many activities on offer.

A dog run area would be the icing on the cake for this brilliant park.

We booked a ensuite site, bathroom was clean and shower was great. Park facilities excellent kids loved the pool and splash pad.
Laundry facilities are good but only accept cash which was a pain I found a machine that did accept card in the older laundry block but after loading it to start I found it wasn’t working.

Great kids park, was full house but still felt it was okay. I wish someone would come up with a creative way to get people to simply slow down within parks as so many kids around and people just don't stay slow.
Great place for families to have a small holiday. Slightly cramped with too many humans and some things a little over priced but overall enjoyed the stay and would stay again.

Stayed for a week good park with plenty things for the kids to do nice having the coffee van etc. The amenities blocks are disgusting don't think they were cleaned at all while we stayed, in the female bathrooms there was faeces in a shower on the floor, and in the men's there's faeces on the walls of the cubicles and the floors are disgusting.
Favourite place to go just for a getaway

Definately not for older retirees
Not sure it suits families either ! So crammed in hundreds of people which is normal
Can’t get near the pool ! Kids screaming yelling - yep normal I guess kids by the hundreds on the pool
Sites dry - no rain or not getting water
The most disappointing was the state of the brand new toilets shower block full of dirt mud hair ! Filth toilet paper almost vomited shit in toilets ! Get the cleaners in there!! If no staff then get some
You’ve got rules for pets I think you need rules for the unruly kids In these facilities
We were probably lucky we got dates mixed up and left today anyway I couldn’t do another one
Not close to shops
Miles from beach
Photos posted doesn’t show dirt or water all over the floors !!! Disgusting
Just too big too greedy and money hungry
Great family park. Good amenities and kids park.

We had such a great time.
Would be great if they had an on-site restaurant/Cafe and a games room for the kids.
Excellent caravan park to bring children! Lots of pools and a big water park! Really good paths and great facilities

Really cool place for families! Kids loved it!
We stayed in a deluxe cabin for 2 days.
Met a very nice family I think they were Ukrainian’s Trying to make them feel welcome security had the totally wrong approach welcome to Australia
Very rude staff,terrible,never coming again, ever.
The security guard is very disrespectful and doesn’t communicate well with guests
Beautiful place but unfortunately staff is very ryde and disrespectful.  Never again will we stay here!!!!!!
Loved it here. Will definitely be back sometime. Lots to do for big and small.

Had an ensuite site and it was excellent!  The ensuite was very clean, spacious and vanity had plenty of storage and room.  The park had great facilities and things to do, especially for kids as the could ride bikes etc safely.  The site we had was a very good size.  One of the best sites we've had.
I stayed in an economy cabin, it was spotlessly clean, everything I needed. The bed and pillows were so incredibly comfortable. Wonderful stay

A M A Z I N G! Just amazing! We stayed here with our children and another couple and it was just a breathtaking stay!
The playground for the children is really wonderful and with the camp kitchen right next to it you can sit & relax while the kiddies play.
The amenities are well maintained, the hosts are super friendly & helpful and the grounds are also well kept.
We were super happy with our stay and are planning to come back just before Easter :)

My mother booked 2x deluxe cabins for a family holiday.
(259 and 260)

Check-in took 45 mins as the cabins hadn't been cleaned (after 2pm).

Both cabins had stains on the toilet floor when we got in.

We have an 18 month old and noticed the floor throughout our cabin was filthy.

The manager (I believe) came to look at the floor.

He told us it was cleaned a week ago.. and it wasn't dirty.

Blamed kids wearing white socks showing floors to be dirty.. our daughter didn't have socks on.

My wife asked for a mop which he found.. she asked for chemicals to clean the floor.. he asked what chemicals.. I responded advising we needed floor cleaner...

He went to get floor cleaner.. never returned.

He also promised a discount for having to clean ourselves.

My wife cleaned the floor herself with dishwashing liquid.

5 minutes in the other cabin, 18 month old had black feet.

Mum cleaned the floor in the other cabin.

The bedside tables were filthy.. sand on top.

Smoke detector system green LED in the bedrooms is are so bright you may as well sleep with a light on.

Shower screen door doesn't stay closed and slides open, you have to hold it closed while showering.

Ceiling fan in the main bedroom rattles constantly.

Discount wasn't forthcoming on checkout.

Definitely will not be back.

***Awaits generic copy and paste response from the owner.

Not over impressed .Firstly I was never told that they have dynamic pricing .Nothing lasts more than 24 hrs.Been here 3 days only soap in 1 dispenser not all .Wife said ladies toilet had run out of paper towels .Maybe she's too fussy.
We had a powered RV site.  Very clean park with a great pool and wonderful staff.

Stayed here for the night & had the best friendly customer service I’ve had in along time. They made us feel very welcomed will be definitely returning again. Beautiful caravan park with lots to do and see. Only down fall was our dishwasher was leaking when used but other than that it was a great experience.

One of the best parks we have seen on our travels so far. The park is new and they have spared no expense on everything. The staff and management are lovely and couldn't do enough for us. We stay at a powered caravan site and was awesome. The park is quiet to. Thank you for having us. Highly recommend this park.
Fantastic place and very nice area

Very nice holiday park with lots of cabins with many more under construction
Nice caravan sites and good facilities
There is a food van and a beer van open on weekends
Lots of kid friendly play equipment and a pool
Was great. It was problematic not having a bed side stand though
Excellent powered sites. Staff all very friendly.
Amazing place to stay. Clean, everything easy access and really nice ammenities! Close to town.

This park is new, we stayed in a cabin and it was lovely. The park has a beautiful pool and a nice size camp kitchen which is well fitted out, there is also a great play area for children. The only downside was you need to drive to places of interest but when so much is on site and new there isn't much need to leave.
We enjoyed staying here for 2 nights as we were travelling around SA.

Caravan sites are going up to $80 or so in October 2024. They are 66 now.
I can't believe the fees!

Staff are stressed to the max and it feels too complicated  and stressful to go there again.

Great park and lots of money being spent.
Stayed there many times, but getting too expensive for my sensibility.
Staying in a pet friendly budget cabin.  Has everything we need,  roomy, with a large balcony
Quiet and very comfortable.

Such a great park, everything about it os perfect whether you're a family or couple hiring cabins or a family, couple, lone traveller in a caravan or motor home.
The parks grounds are immaculate, the cabins, toilets, bbq's, laundry & community area are super clean and have that fresh clean smell.
Water park, jumping pillow, soccer grass area, volleyball are very well done & super popular + skate park/ pump track are out the back through the gate.
Fire pits look great, newly added deluxe power sites have individual fire pits with gairy lights 👌.
Deluxe cabins were perfect, plenty of options  to suit your desire & budget!
Gin tastings available most Saturdays is an added bonus & very well organised.
We had an ensuite caravan site. The ensuite is new. There was a concrete slab and lawn. The park is amazing. They have done a lot of renovations. We definitely will be back.
We booked a powered site for 5 days. The amenities were very well kept and the whole park has had a revamp and looks terrific

Busy park, lots to do for the kids, pool, playground, bike track, kart hire. Camp kitchen very new and all the facilities you need if camping. Bathrooms clean most of the time due to high traffic through out the day they were quite wet by the end of the day. Looks like only just recently updated a lot of the park. It was a lovely stay.

We have just finished travelling Australia and this cv park would have to ne the best we have stayed in. Firstly the owner could not have been nicer,upgrading me spare of moment,the front desk ladies could not have been nicer more helpfull.
The cabin we stayed in was imaculate.even the public areas toilets camp kitchens  were spotless and spelt sterile. There was so much for the kids to do 2xplaygrounds, jumping pillow,2xpools 1 with spa, movies,being long weekend there were activities galore from crafts to petting zoo,coffee van,pizza truck,alcohol venders.some sites had fire pits and lights,I could go on and on.can not recomend this place enough and will def be back.
Had a midweek break in an accessible cabin, everything we needed was supplied. It was clean and a peaceful 2 night getaway. Highly recommend a visit.
Beautiful clean cabins..perfect 👌
Cabin was cosy,clean,comfortable and had everything we needed. The park was perfect for a family holiday or retreat from busyness. A wonderful place to relax and explore the beautiful surroundings.
One of the best,  if not the best, caravan parks we've stayed in.  So clean, neat, quiet and great amenities.  Highly recommend.

Great caravan park! Perfect for families. We stayed in a deluxe cabin and found it very spacious and spotlessly clean. Would definitely stay here again.
Very close to Goolwa main street, Woolworths etc. Lots to see in the area including the seals at the Barrage and the Coorong.
Amazing park facilities including park, jumping pillow, two heated swimming pools, water park, sliding, swings, etc. You can also hire paddle bikes and trikes. Overall it’s fun with family.
Stayed four nights in an ensuite caravan site. HUGE spaciuos site, great facilities. Excellent location for families. Short drive into town. Would recommend
A great caravan park for children. So much for them to do.
Nice family location
One of the best parks we have been to. We only stayed one night but will definitely be back. Staff are doing an amazing job
It was a fantastic place and kids loved it. Definitely recommended if you have young kids. The only issue was there were still small trees in the powered sites.

This is the best park we have stayed in with our caravan. Everything any family, couple or single person could ask for. Fabulous water park and play equipment any child would love. Immaculate new facilities, wide roads an extremely well kept park. Close to the town of Goolwa. We also loved the pancakes for breakfast, but arrived too late for the sausage sizzle.

Stayed at powered site with double concrete pad. Easily the best facilities that I have seen in a caravan park. From the amenities to the recreational facilities it is all first class.
Special mention to the camp kitchen which could be mistaken for a professional kitchen.

*Great holiday park with friendly staff to check us in.
*Great powered caravan sites on grass or concrete slabs
*Clean & modern amenities
*Park had Fund raising Sausage Sizzle for lunch 1 day & another day pancake breakfast all for Gold coin donation to raise funds for Rural farmers in drought

Great park and fantastic facilities but not happy about the changing rate per day change when the mid week price we paid as a member was far higher than the previous days as the park was almost empty. We love the G’day parks but will be cautious booking ahead at Discovery Parks in the future

The park has been updated. New pool and water park. New playground.

Plenty of free BBQs and covered eating areas.

A large fully equipped kitchen with a large fully enclosed pergola including a large tv. Great for gatherings or just hanging out.

Clean toilets and bathrooms with wheel chair access and family bathroom in the new area.

Wonderful lawns and pathways.

New cabins are spacious and tastefully decorated. Everything from fresh towels and toiletries, to tea and coffee provided.

The original spaces still hold the charm of a well established park with lots of trees original pool kitchen and bathrooms.

There are many camping sites with different options from lawned sites to powered suites with bathrooms and everything in between.

Two laundry areas.

The team at reception and maintenance crew, were very professional and bent over backwards for their guests.

There is plenty for children and family's.  No need to leave the grounds, wood fire oven and piano in the original area with jumping mat and swimming pool.

Volley ball court, soccer goal and activity room  in the new space. Different types of go carts and trike hire.

The kiosk has ice creams, swimming goggles,some necessities and maps of the surrounding area.  Activities are planned regularly. There was a wooldfire pizza van during our stay, the pizzas were delicious.

There is a small shopping centre a few minutes away.

This park is truly a wonderful place to stay. The best in this area.
Awesome park, got the lot and close to everything
If your kids bring pet Bunnies camping this park has lots of rabbits with myxomatosis so don't bring your pet rabbits.

enjoyed my time there, was happy with customer service.
Facilities for pretty much everything you need
Pet friendly cabin was great
Great park with all the facilities you would expect
Great place, 2 pools, a water park, massive play ground, camp kitchens are so nice a clean. So much for the kids to do. Friendly staff, we will be back again.
Had a 5 night stay in tents on a powered site, with the family. This place was very accommodating and lots to do for the whole family. Amenities were fantastic. Will definitely be coming back😃

The family are having a wonderful time here at Goolwa.
There are plenty of activities to discover and enjoy.
They are even pet friendly!

Came here and stayed on the new powered ensuite sites.

Everything was amazing here. Great facilities, clean, new private ensuites. New waterpark and pools. Massive skatepark and pump track out the back.

Lots of activities and visiting food trucks and Gin Tastings to entertain both the adults and kids.

Text message updates to keep us informed. Quick easy check in and out. Couldn't be happier
Beautiful place

Camp site nice and big, the kids loved the pool and water park but the toilets and showers needed to be cleaned a lot more as the park was very busy and they were very dirty, the service / communication with the reception staff was not very pleasant as when calling several times trying to find out how much we needed to finished paying no
Answer or not receiving the invoice emails when reception staff said they had sent it.

I would like to start by commending Goolwa discovery park on their simply amazing park. So well maintained and so well presented. My partner and I are. members and now "best mate members" Our entire family ( 6 children plus partners and 2 grand children ) have stayed there over 10 times in the last 12 months and have always had a great time.

However I was severely disappointed at the way my partner was spoken to/treated today when enquiring if after working in the local area we could take her 6 year old for a swim and play in the water park for an hour. He absolutely loves the entire park and especially water park! I have lost count at the amount of discovery parks I have been to while working away from home and paid a small $10-$15 fee to use the amenities and have a swim before returning home. So being "best mate members" I thought this would be possible. Instead we headed home with one very upset little man. After so much money spent in the last 12 months, I doubt we or the family will be returning. Perhaps we'll consider the Big 4 in Renmark?

Great park to stay in. Kids have an awesome time here. So many things to do. Water slides, splash park. 2 pools and 2 jumping pillows, playground, heaps more. The cabins are clean spacious and have everything needed. Check in was fast and friendly. Highly recommended.
Shut the door in my face as I went to buy an ice cream. They shut at 5, it’s 4:02

Great atmosphere, kids are constantly playing within the park. The small tennis court is completely surrounded by razor sharp wood chips and rocks (feels like it anyway) so wear shoes if you plan on recovering the ball.
Amazing experience!  The kids loved the bouncing pillow.  Would love to come back if I'm in Australia again.

Loved it all.. Goolwa staff are very friendly and helpful....  this has nothing to do with caravan staff below..
booking dates was hard. I wanted to take 5 days . Then 5 days later... The operator wanted me to put in for the other 5 days...(i didn't know about you having to book 2x 5 days at the same time) The operator said I could only get 5 more days in July?    That was a fib.....
So it was all too hard, so I  ended up  taking the 10 days

none of this was the caravan parks fault .
We're here with our van, good sites and clean amenities with friendly staff.

Spent a Easter weekend here was great
They put thing on for the kids
Amazing park very well setout. Very comfortable new cabins.

This is a fantastic park, the sites are large,  the facilities are great, as is the location and with the River Murray and the Southern Ocean at your doorstep you can spend weeks here and never get bored, this is an amazing area.
Great environment for holidaying.
Great park, we had a powered site.
Beautiful park no

Great park, We stayed in a deluxe 2 bedroom cabin, very clean, plenty of room. Even though we don't have little kids there is plenty for them to do, was lovely hearing them having fun. Park is spotless. Only complaint is bathroom needs a couple of hooks so you can hangs clothes up while showering, the main bed was too soft, don't know if anything can be done with the blinds as the light comes in on sides in morning, would stay here again
Front desk staff are wonderful and very helpful .
Best park I've stayed at.
Kids had a great time with heaps to do

Beautiful park, very family oriented.  They are working really hard at making it a great park, the staff are so friendly and helpful.  The kids club is amazing, my girls loved every minute of their activities, it kept them busy whilst mum & dad could relax. Thankyou Goolwa Discovery for a wonderful stay.

Really nice park. We stayed in one of the cabins and it was like a hotel room, not what you’d expect at a caravan park! New facilities with everything that you need.

Very kid friendly with 2 bouncy pillows, pool, waterpark, playground etc.

Walking distance to the shops.

Only downside was the sausage sizzle the staff put on. Great idea and was only a gold coin donation however we were told from 12pm and when we arrived after 1pm found out it was only for 30min from 12.30pm-1pm. A lot of the other guests were not aware of the 30min time frame.

In any case great getaway destination for the whole family!

The most friendly, fun, clean family space!! Such a great holiday spot to go to with kids. All of the employees were so friendly and welcoming. And the new cabins are just beautiful with the most comfortable bed! Already have booked for next year. Thanks for such awesome week away team x
Very new.... watch what you're charged. On line $16 cheaper
Everything is new and clean

2nd visit, a year later, and WOW what amazing improvements.  Absolutely 1st class facilities, family friendly areas,  games facilities,  pool, everything is outstanding.  Well done team on such a wonderful stay.   Park staff were great.
What a great experience, keep up the good work.
Awesome splash pad slides and playground for the kids. Had a holiday program running art and craft and a sport set up outside. Movie night for the kids too! Plenty of space clean new amenities.
Friendly staff nice park
This location is for mum and dads but kids will love this place as well. All year round. Charlie xxxxx
Great park. Excellent amenities. Could not fault in any way. Great for children, although we prefer parks without all the jumping pillows, etc. Enough room not to be bothered by noise

Newly upgraded caravan park with excellent activities for families including 2 jumpy pillows, 2 heated pool areas, water park, multiple spaces for ball sports, basketball ring, badminton/volleyball court, outdoor movies, kids activities club, etc. Not within walking distance of the beach but close enough to town for a coffee walk.

Possibly the most amazing caravan park you can stay in.  Similar style of park to Sandstone Point on Bribie Island in Qld.,  but not as expensive & with colder weather, especially if your here in winter.  The deluxe sites are magnificent.  Bbqs are fabulous. Get as hot as our ziggy.
The park's features and amenities are very nice... Just don't stay in cabin 236 as the view is obstructed by the noisy pool pump shed...also had a broken shower head that should be fixed by now.
Loved the cabin, so clean, facilities are lovely, lots to do in park and locally.

I've booked a cabin with 2 bedrooms. It was clean, tidy and got almost everything we needed to have a great holiday. The place is beautiful and if you are lucky, you will see loads of families like you at night to chat and have a good time.

Decided to take an impromptu night away and I’m so glad we did because we have found a gem of a caravan park. Even in winter there is still so much to do especially for the kids. Beautiful park. They had a pizza van so we enjoyed wood oven pizza for dinner. The staff were kind enough to let all the kids in the park ride the go karts for free for half an hour which mum and dad enjoyed too. We didn’t have a fire but loved that you could have a fire pit at the tent sites. The playground was well enjoyed by the kids and the bmx park right next door was a hit. Overall it had a great vibe and we can’t wait to go back in the warmer months and enjoy it even more! Thank you!

I'm sad to have to give it a two star rating on my experience, some thing are easily five stars,  facility's, park design, play area for kids, the pools are heated, playgrounds, site sizes, all 5 stars. I was so happy to see kids out playing and having fun.
However we had a deluxe site it was lovely, but with soccer goals just behind these sites,  caused lots of issues, I personally was hit with balls 4 times, our van hit at least 5 times that we know.  People just walking through your camp site because they didn't realise it was all our site, take wood out of our firepits.  It is a 5km speed limit but bikes and scooters could go at any speed on paths.
Sensational park, the new facilities are top quality. Once all the extensions and upgrades are done we are definitely going back for another stay. Staff are all happy and super friendly 😊

Really nicely maintained and set out park with exceptional facilities. The only issue is you pay for a premium site only for balls to be continually kicked into the van, car and us by kids on the grass behind us and no one seems to care
The end but of the park is all new they have done so much on the park it’s stunning there is so much room the kids will love it close to town and we thank the staff for a wonderful stay

Wonderful and big caravan park,  lots of powered sites, grass, concrete slab and grass matt's.  Cabins, two Wonderful pools one has a kids pool and great playground.  Lovely camp kitchen and dog friendly.  Staff and friendly and very helpful.
